title: S4d: migrate feedback-digest (29 anchors, 26 unparsed)
action: Standard area migration — identical contract to cell f2-5 (read it, plus commit 3d69a2d as the freshest worked example). TARGET docs/specs/feedback-digest.md, expect 29 anchors / 26 unparsed blocks. The 26 residual are 18 unnumbered bold-lead behaviour blocks + 8 continuation bullets — declare unparsed_blocks 26 HONESTLY and never invent ids for them (D10). This is the highest unparsed ratio so far; if STEP 0 shows the anchors are a minority of the real content, say so in the trace as a finding — the migration is still correct (the anchor-bearing sections are what the gate governs), but the reader deserves to know the area's rule numbering is thin. Same STEP 0-4, prohibitions, RED-FIRST. Chain grows to 71 suites.

truths: fidelity min/median quoted above the 0.60 floor with no concept edited
pin declares unparsed_blocks 26 (not zeroed); blob_sha verified against the committed copy
prohibitions: never invent ids for the 26 unnumbered blocks (D10)
never edit a concept or lower a threshold to clear the fidelity floor
